hero.title: I build conversion-focused web experiences that are fast, accessible, and scalable.

whatIDo.title: Building product experiences that perform and convert.
whatIDo.subtitle: A calm, focused process from speed to UX to architecture.

performance.title: Performance
performance.body: I reduce friction by targeting Core Web Vitals, removing render bottlenecks, and designing for fast perceived performance across real devices.

ux.title: UX
ux.body: I build conversion-oriented interfaces with clean hierarchy, clear copy, and accessible interactions that help users act confidently.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.body: I design scalable React and Next.js foundations that teams can ship on quickly without sacrificing code quality or maintainability.

featuredCaseStudy.title: Mobile Payment Flow Story
featuredCaseStudy.subtitle: A structured case study through problem, solution, and measurable result.

problem.title: Problem
problem.body: A high-traffic product had rising drop-off on mobile checkout and unclear failure states during payment redirects.

solution.title: Solution
solution.body: I redesigned the checkout flow around trust, speed, and recovery, then implemented a resilient frontend state machine with measurable instrumentation.

result.title: Result
result.body: Checkout completion increased by 23%, one-tap payment adoption reached 60% in 30 days, and support tickets tied to payment UX dropped.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of recent work — from product dashboards to design systems.
projects.pageSubtitle: A collection of work across product, design systems, and infrastructure.

projectDetail.translateSolution: Translate constraints into a scalable solution

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A bit about me and how I work.
about.paragraph1: I'm a Senior Frontend Architect with a focus on building fast, accessible, and maintainable web applications. I care deeply about design systems, performance budgets, and developer experience — and I believe the best products come from tight collaboration between design and engineering.
about.paragraph2: My work spans from greenfield product development to scaling design systems and mentoring teams. I've led frontend efforts for products serving millions of users and have a track record of shipping with high Lighthouse scores and strong accessibility compliance.
about.paragraph3: When I'm not coding, I'm usually reading about systems design, tinkering with side projects, or outdoors. I'm always open to interesting problems and new collaborations.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.cta: I'm open to new opportunities and interesting problems. Drop me a line and I'll get back to you.
contact.pageSubtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Drop me a line.
contact.formIntro: The best way to reach me is by email. I typically respond within a couple of days.

footer.tagline: Senior Frontend Architect & UX Engineer. Building fast, accessible, and scalable web experiences.
